"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\DeepCopy.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\MINGW-~1\X86_64~1.0-P\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\DeepCopy.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\DeepCopy.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\MINGW-~1\X86_64~1.0-P\mingw64\bin\C__~1.EXE -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\DeepCopy.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o DeepCopy.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libDeepCopy.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\DeepCopy.dir\linkLibs.rsp
